name: Whismur
description: Usually, its cries are like quiet murmurs. If frightened, it shrieks at the same volume as a jet plane.

attacks.name: Shout
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

name: Loudred
description: The shock waves from its cries can tip over trucks. It stamps its feet to power up.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Exploud
description: Its howls can be heard over six miles away. It emits all sorts of noises from the ports on its body.

attacks.name: Destructive Sound
attacks.effect: Your opponent reveals his or her hand. Discard all Item cards you find there.

attacks.name: Round
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage times the number of your Pokémon that have the Round attack.

abilities.name: Overflow
abilities.effect: If your opponent’s Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack of this Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Plasma Gale
attacks.effect: Discard a Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you can't discard a Plasma Energy, this attack does nothing.

name: Skitty
description: It shows its cute side by chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

attacks.name: Triple Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Patrat
description: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won't notice a foe coming from behind.

attacks.name: Reckless Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

name: Patrat
description: Extremely cautious, there is always one keeping watch, but they don't notice enemies coming from behind.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Watchog
description: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

attacks.name: Fast Swipe
attacks.effect: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Biting Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Watchog
description: Using luminescent matter, it makes its eyes and body glow and stuns attacking opponents.

attacks.name: Second Bite
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Bouffalant
description: They are known to charge so wildly that if a train were to enter their territory, they would send it flying.

attacks.name: Tool Breaker
attacks.effect: Discard a Pokémon Tool card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Rufflet
description: It stands up to massive opponents, not out of courage, but out of recklessness. But that is how it gets stronger.

attacks.name: Incessant Peck
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Braviary
description: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

abilities.name: Big Wing
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may have your opponent switch his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Wild Edge
attacks.effect: You may do 20 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

name: Bicycle
effect: Draw cards until you have 4 cards in your hand.

name: Colress
effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).

name: Colress Machine
effect: Search your deck for a Plasma Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Team Plasma Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Escape Rope
effect: Each player switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon. (Your opponent switches first. If a player does not have a Benched Pokémon, he or she doesn’t switch Pokémon.)

name: Ether
effect: Reveal the top card of your deck. If that card is a basic Energy card, attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. If it is not a basic Energy card, return it to the top of your deck.

name: Eviolite
effect: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is a Basic Pokémon, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Hypnotoxic Laser
effect: Your opponent’s Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent’s Active Pokémon is also Asleep.

name: Plasma Frigate
effect: Each Pokémon that has any Plasma Energy attached to it (both yours and your opponent’s) has no Weakness.

name: Team Plasma Grunt
effect: Discard a Team Plasma card from your hand. (If you can’t discard a Team Plasma card, you can’t play this card.) Draw 4 cards.

name: Virbank City Gym
effect: Put 2 more damage counters on Poisoned Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s) between turns.

name: Dowsing Machine
effect: Discard 2 cards from your hand. (If you can’t discard 2 cards, you can’t play this card.) Put a Trainer card from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Scramble Switch
effect: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, you may move as many Energy attached to the old Active Pokémon to the new Active Pokémon as you like.

name: Victory Piece
effect: If this card is attached to Victini-EX, Victini-EX can use its attacks regardless of the amount or type of Energy attached to it.

attacks.name: Turbo Energize
attacks.effect: Search your deck for 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Intensifying Burn
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Pokémon-EX, this attack does 50 more damage.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Frost Prison
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Plasma Energy attached to it, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Righteous Edge
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Steel Bullet
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

abilities.name: Overflow
abilities.effect: If your opponent’s Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an attack of this Pokémon, take 1 more Prize card.

attacks.name: Plasma Gale
attacks.effect: Discard a Plasma Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you can't discard a Plasma Energy, this attack does nothing.

name: Colress
effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent’s).

name: Charizard
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

attacks.name: Split Bomb
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Scorching Fire
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Blastoise
description: This extremely rare Pokémon is a different color than usual. It is very hard to find.

abilities.name: Deluge
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a Water Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Random Receiver
effect: Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal a Supporter card. Put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
